summary: Frontend-only re-test of Saksham portfolio after 4 iteration fixes (avatar path, Bracket metrics, per-case CTA cleanup, socials/email update). All 15 targeted checks passed on live preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Work.jsx sits at ~479 lines and mock.js is a monolithic ~625 line data file mixing case-study copy, socials, nav, profile, principles etc. Consider splitting per-case-study files (data/caseStudies/bracket.js etc) to improve maintainability. Non-blocking.

Clipboard writeText failure path in AboutMe.jsx swallows the error silently (`catch (_) {}`). Real users on browsers without clipboard permission will see no feedback. A small toast or a manual-select fallback would improve UX. Non-blocking.

Placeholder placehold.co images are still used for Bracket / Tello / Hyundai / Harman case studies. Users will see 'replace this dummy image' captions. Should be replaced with real assets before shipping.
verified_checks: About Me avatar loads: src=/crab-avatar.png, naturalWidth=509, complete=true, no broken image
Old email 'hello@saksham.design' absent from DOM everywhere
About Me 'Copy email' button click -> label changes to 'Copied — shuklasaksham01@gmail.com' and clipboard receives 'shuklasaksham01@gmail.com'
Bracket Impact tiles show exactly '123 / 68 / 115 / 90' with correct labels; forbidden old metrics (2K+, Early waitlist, 6+ Hours, 80%, 50%) not present
Bracket CTA: data-testid=open-designs-bracket, text 'Open Bracket', href https://use-bracket.com/, target _blank
Verizon Tello.ai: 0 CTA buttons with data-testid^=open-designs-
Contact socials: LinkedIn/Behance/Instagram/Email/Call all point to correct hrefs; Twitter link removed
Command palette (Cmd+K) opens; 'Copy email — shuklasaksham01@gmail.com' entry present; no 'hello@saksham.design' entry
Sidebar 'SAKSHAM SHUKLA' header, 6 nav items, keyboard shortcut '1' returns to About Me
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes from this iteration are verified working. If retesting, note that navigator.clipboard.writeText fails silently in headless Playwright without granted permissions; use page.context.grant_permissions(['clipboard-write']) OR patch navigator.clipboard via add_init_script before reload to observe the 'Copied — ...' state change. The site uses in-app keyboard shortcuts 1-6 for section navigation and Cmd/Ctrl+K for the palette.
